metadata.tie_breaker: Better OHCRA Championship result wins a total-points tie.

watch.headline: Top-five spot is mathematically safe
watch.qualification_note: Outrigger leads sixth-place Keahiakahoe Canoe Club by 12 points. With 11 crews listed, that gap is too large to lose in one race.
watch.seed_note: Can improve seed by finishing at least 1 place ahead of Leeward Kai Canoe Club. Nearest seed threat is Kailua Canoe Club, 9 points back.

watch.headline: Chasing the top-five cutoff

watch.seed_note: Tied on points with Honolulu Pearl Canoe Club; beating them at OHCRA Championships can improve seed. Nearest seed threat is Anuenue Canoe Club, 3 points back.
